seo_title: Current Time in São Paulo, Brazil — BRT (UTC-3)
seo_description: What time is it in São Paulo right now? São Paulo uses BRT (Brasília Time, UTC-3). Live clock, sunrise & sunset times, São Paulo vs New York/London/Tokyo time difference.

timezone_facts.dst_notes: Brazil abolished Daylight Saving Time in 2019. São Paulo now uses BRT (UTC-3) year-round.

faq.question: What time is it in São Paulo right now?
faq.answer: São Paulo operates on Brasília Time (BRT), which is UTC-3. Brazil abolished Daylight Saving Time in 2019, so São Paulo uses UTC-3 year-round. Check the live clock above for the exact current time.

faq.question: What time zone is São Paulo in?
faq.answer: São Paulo is in the Brasília Time (BRT) zone, which is UTC-3. This timezone covers all of southeastern Brazil including São Paulo, Rio de Janeiro, and Brasília. Since 2019, Brazil no longer observes Daylight Saving Time.

faq.question: Does São Paulo observe Daylight Saving Time?
faq.answer: No. Brazil abolished Daylight Saving Time in April 2019. São Paulo now remains on BRT (UTC-3) year-round, making international scheduling simpler and more predictable.

faq.question: What is the time difference between São Paulo and New York?
faq.answer: São Paulo is 2 hours ahead of New York during Eastern Standard Time (November–March). During US Eastern Daylight Time (March–November), São Paulo is only 1 hour ahead of New York. Since Brazil no longer observes DST, this difference changes only when the US switches clocks.

faq.question: What is the time difference between São Paulo and London?
faq.answer: São Paulo is 3 hours behind London during Greenwich Mean Time (October–March) and 4 hours behind during British Summer Time (March–October). Since Brazil does not observe DST, the difference changes based on UK clock changes only.

faq.question: What is the best time to call São Paulo from the US?
faq.answer: From the US East Coast (EST), the best time to call São Paulo for business is 9:00 AM – 3:00 PM EST, which corresponds to 11:00 AM – 5:00 PM BRT in São Paulo. From the West Coast (PST), call between 6:00 AM – 12:00 PM PST.

faq.question: What are business hours in São Paulo?
faq.answer: São Paulo business hours are typically Monday to Friday, 8:00 AM to 6:00 PM BRT. Banks generally operate 10:00 AM to 4:00 PM. São Paulo is the financial capital of Brazil and Latin America's largest city by GDP.

faq.question: What is the time difference between São Paulo and London?
faq.answer: São Paulo (BRT, UTC-3) is 3 hours behind London (GMT, UTC+0) in winter and 4 hours behind during British Summer Time (BST, UTC+1). The gap shifts only when the UK changes clocks, since Brazil no longer observes DST.

content_blocks.title: São Paulo Time Zone — BRT (UTC-3)
content_blocks.content: São Paulo uses Brasília Time (BRT), which is 3 hours behind Coordinated Universal Time (UTC-3). Brazil permanently abolished Daylight Saving Time in 2019, so this offset is fixed year-round. São Paulo is the largest city in the Southern Hemisphere and South America's financial hub, home to over 22 million people in its metropolitan area.

content_blocks.title: São Paulo vs World Cities — Time Differences
content_blocks.content: São Paulo (BRT, UTC-3) is 2–3 hours ahead of New York (EST/EDT), 3–4 hours behind London (GMT/BST), 6 hours behind Paris (CET/CEST), 11 hours behind Dubai (GST), 14 hours behind Singapore (SGT), and 16 hours behind Tokyo (JST). These differences are fixed on the São Paulo side since Brazil eliminated DST.

eeat_footer: Time zone data for São Paulo is sourced from the IANA Time Zone Database (America/Sao_Paulo). Brazil's abolition of DST was enacted by Decree No. 9,772 of April 25, 2019.
